_notes: Source: AU Core AllergyIntolerance (Australian realm). Target: US Core AllergyIntolerance (US realm). Both are thin profiles derived from R4 base AllergyIntolerance. Key differences: AU Core uses an Australian-specific code VS (hypersensitivity-intolerance) while US Core uses a US NLM clinical substances VS; AU Core does not add required bindings on clinicalStatus/verificationStatus in its differential while US Core explicitly re-declares them (required); AU Core adds onset[x] and reaction.severity as MS elements which US Core does not; US Core adds extensible clinical-findings binding on reaction.manifestation. Patient reference targets differ (au-core-patient vs us-core-patient).

drifts.description: clinicalStatus binding tightened in target: source does not explicitly declare a binding in its differential (inherits R4 required:allergyintolerance-clinical); target explicitly adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-clinical). Required binding explicitly declared in target but not in source differential.

verificationStatus binding tightened in target: source does not explicitly declare a binding in its differential (inherits R4 required:allergyintolerance-verification); target explicitly adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/allergyintolerance-verification). Required binding explicitly declared in target but not in source differential.

code binding changed: source extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/indicator-hypersensitivity-intolerance-to-substance-2) [AU-specific VS] → target extensible(http://cts.nlm.nih.gov/fhir/ValueSet/2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1186.8) [US NLM clinical substances VS]. Same binding strength (extensible), different value sets.

patient reference target changed: source constrains to au-core-patient (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-patient) → target constrains to us-core-patient (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-patient). Different realm-specific patient profiles.

onset[x] MustSupport removed: source marks onset[x] mustSupport=true with types [dateTime, Age, Period, Range]; target US Core does not constrain onset[x] in its differential. MS removed on optional element.

reaction.manifestation binding added in target: source has mustSupport=true with no explicit binding; target adds extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-findings). Binding tightened from no explicit declaration (inherits R4 example binding) to extensible in target.
reaction.severity MustSupport removed: source marks reaction.severity mustSupport=true; target US Core does not constrain reaction.severity in its differential. MS removed on optional element.
